description: private_key searches for the smallest d >= 1 with (e * d) % phi == 1 — the number that undoes e
encrypt returns pow(m, e, n) — locking a number on the n-clock with the public exponent
decrypt returns pow(c, d, n), and encrypt-then-decrypt returns the original number
Uses three-argument pow, understands public (e,n) vs private d, a return on every function
